infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KABZAA needs your location to track runs and capture territory on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: KABZAA uses your location while you run to record your route.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow KABZAA to use your location to track your run and capture territory.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow KABZAA to use your location while using the app.
